overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets under overpasses, futuristic skyscrapers shrouded in fog, and the Arasaka corporate building with its distinctive vertical garden. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections on wet pavement and atmospheric volumetric lighting.

events.description: pedestrian with orange jacket and black umbrella crosses the wet street from left to right
camera turns right at the intersection corner, following the curved sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass and turning right at the intersection corner, navigating around the traffic light pole

notable_agents.action: person with orange jacket and umbrella crossing the wet street
sedan with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support beams spanning the intersection
tall black pole with horizontal traffic signal arm extending over the road
illuminated vertical advertisement screen on the far building wall
modern street light with bright white LED panel on black pole
rain-slicked dark asphalt with reflective puddles and white lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete highway overpass at a rainy night intersection. The camera walks forward past a traffic light pole as a pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the street. A sedan drives through the intersection with headlights cutting through the rain. The environment features wet reflective pavement, digital billboards, and the heavy concrete infrastructure of the elevated highway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk beneath elevated highway ramp

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing fog-shrouded skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the dark sky
passing under highway support beams as the road curves left, revealing more of the open street

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, occasionally glancing up at the towering buildings through the rain and fog

notable_agents.action: car driving along the parallel road with red taillights visible through the rain

entered.detail: curved concrete highway ramp with metal support beams and underside lighting
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the foggy night sky
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved sidewalk beneath the elevated highway ramp, the camera moves away from the intersection. The massive concrete infrastructure dominates overhead while fog-shrouded glass skyscrapers become visible in the distance. Red neon light strips illuminate the building on the right, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the artificial lighting. A car passes by on the parallel road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching corporate building with vertical living wall

events.description: vertical garden wall with dense vegetation comes into full view on the right side
camera tilts up to view the illuminated signage mounted on the living wall facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the Arasaka building while looking up at the vertical garden and illuminated corporate signage

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in dense green vegetation with integrated white illumination
large white illuminated letters spelling 'ARASAKA' mounted vertically on the living wall

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive building featuring a massive vertical garden wall covered in dense vegetation. The Arasaka corporate signage is illuminated in white against the green living wall. Red neon strips run horizontally along the building's edge. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the skyscrapers above while continuing to walk forward along the rain-soaked sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza entrance with living wall and benches

events.description: moving from sidewalk into the paved plaza area with benches and landscaping
Arasaka logo sign becomes clearly visible in the plaza ahead, glowing white against the dark building

agents.ego_description: walking past the living wall into the Arasaka corporate plaza, approaching the building entrance

entered.detail: circular corporate logo with 'ARASAKA' text illuminated in white on the building facade
modern rectangular concrete seating blocks arranged in the plaza
tropical palm trees in planters providing greenery to the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sidewalk into the Arasaka corporate plaza, passing by the massive vertical garden wall now on the left. The paved plaza features concrete benches and palm trees. The illuminated Arasaka logo sign becomes visible in the distance, marking the building entrance. The environment maintains the rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk atmosphere with red accent lighting along the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty urban intersection under a highway overpass toward the polished corporate plaza of a futuristic skyscraper. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass in the rain, moving past a traffic light and a pedestrian with an umbrella as a sedan's headlights cut through the wet, reflective pavement. As the camera follows a curved sidewalk away from the intersection, the heavy concrete infrastructure overhead gives way to a vista of fog-shrouded glass skyscrapers illuminated by red neon strips. The scene then shifts toward a massive vertical garden wall where white Arasaka signage glows against dense vegetation, prompting the camera to tilt upward to capture the towering scale of the surrounding buildings. Finally, the movement transitions from the sidewalk into a paved corporate plaza featuring concrete benches and palm trees, leading toward the illuminated Arasaka logo at the building's entrance.
